title: About Us
text:
Launched in 2017, EprimeData is the first software platform that provides powerful enterprise-grade analytics intuitively and at scale at an affordable price. Today, we are the leading SEO and product data analytics solution in the market.
We are a team of 40+ experienced software developers, retail, and marketing professionals based in Paris, France. We recently raised $7 million in Series A Equity funding to become the global leader in Multi-Channel eCommerce Analytics and Optimization.

title: EprimeData Supports 21 Major Marketplaces
